titleStmt.title: SII 23.510: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 510. (A.R. No. 510 of 1907.) Madurai, Madurai Taluk, Madurai District Madanagōpāla temple—on 13 other stones in the same place

summary.p: There are actually 15 stones (not 13) on which these inscribed portions are engraved. Their sequence with each other is not very clear partly because the stones are all dis-arranged and some of them are mutilated and damaged. They have been, however, so grouped into four sections, each with a few pieces, that the conten's of each line of a piece may be read in continuity with the corresponding line of other pieces. The inscription is dated in Kaliyuga 4[6]47, corresponding to Śaka 1468 and cyclic year Parābhava and purports to give the genealogy of Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Rāmarāja-Tirumalaya-Mahārāja i.e., Tirumala I, the Karnāṭa king beginning from Vishṇu and coming down through a long line of chiefs. The object of the inscription seems to be the establishment of a hundred villages for Brāhmaṇas—both Vaishṇava and others—and apportionment of shares of land for their living; by Tirumala who is stated also to have provided for worship in Śiva and Vishṇu temples and for their repairs. The temples and the lands are not specifically known.
summary.table: Section I [c1]Piece XIV [c2]Piece I [c3]Piece VII [c1]1 -[r]āya namaḥ ēta[d]brahmēndra rudrāṇām mau- [c2] -sam•• rājasya••• [śrīdharaḥ]- [c3] -ktila ceṉṟa varuṣam 4[6]47- [c1]2 -hani śakābda 14[6]8- āṉa parābhava varuṣam- [c2] -mum śrīman mahāmaṇḍalē śvara rāma rāja tirumalaiya— [c3] -mahārājākkaḷ vamśā vabi— [c1]3 -guravē na[ma]ḥ | śrī bhūmau satrayāgasva••••[kramātnya]- [c2] -tatvācyutōvatu | harēlīlā varāhasya dam ṣṭrādaṇḍa[ḥ*]sa pātu[va]ḥ- [c3] -hēmādikralaśāyatradhātrī śphatra [c1]4 -•••• viṣṇōrnnābhikamala sam bhavāt dra .- [c2] -gataḥ purūravā nāma tasyāyurnahuṣōsya sutō yayāti [stadvamśē]- [c3] -bahavō rāja sattamāḥ | tadanvayapā— [c1]5 -mā••••• tēṣām majābhaḥ•••• drāya- [c2] -jjanam mandhayāḥ tasmā[t*] jātaśśatā nīkastatōjajñē•••• •••••ṣamēndra u- [c3] -bhū[t*]tasmāt tatassō mēndranā[maka]ḥ u- [c1]6 -t jātōvai dharmmavat samasta ••••• [c2] -dhara••••rjjayā••••bhiṣē canam••••••••• [c3] -pañcāśa[du]ttaram dharmmu tmanō- pūca nakṣatrattu nāḷ naṅkumāraṉ

Section I [c1]Piece XIV [c2]Piece I [c3]Piece VII [c1]1 -[r]āya namaḥ ēta[d]brahmēndra rudrāṇām mau- [c2] -sam•• rājasya••• [śrīdharaḥ]- [c3] -ktila ceṉṟa varuṣam 4[6]47- [c1]2 -hani śakābda 14[6]8- āṉa parābhava varuṣam- [c2] -mum śrīman mahāmaṇḍalē śvara rāma rāja tirumalaiya— [c3] -mahārājākkaḷ vamśā vabi— [c1]3 -guravē na[ma]ḥ | śrī bhūmau satrayāgasva••••[kramātnya]- [c2] -tatvācyutōvatu | harēlīlā varāhasya dam ṣṭrādaṇḍa[ḥ*]sa pātu[va]ḥ- [c3] -hēmādikralaśāyatradhātrī śphatra [c1]4 -•••• viṣṇōrnnābhikamala sam bhavāt dra .- [c2] -gataḥ purūravā nāma tasyāyurnahuṣōsya sutō yayāti [stadvamśē]- [c3] -bahavō rāja sattamāḥ | tadanvayapā— [c1]5 -mā••••• tēṣām majābhaḥ•••• drāya- [c2] -jjanam mandhayāḥ tasmā[t*] jātaśśatā nīkastatōjajñē•••• •••••ṣamēndra u- [c3] -bhū[t*]tasmāt tatassō mēndranā[maka]ḥ u- [c1]6 -t jātōvai dharmmavat samasta ••••• [c2] -dhara••••rjjayā••••bhiṣē canam••••••••• [c3] -pañcāśa[du]ttaram dharmmu tmanō-
Section II [c1]Piece IX [c2]Piece V [c3]Piece XII [c4]Piece II [c1]1 cacōpi kōnnapō ••• itilō kavikhyāta tējasa[u]- [c2] -pōjvalaḥ [nava]timma nṛpō[ja]jñē••• [c3] -viṭṭha[l]ēśvarabhū-

Section II [c1]Piece IX [c2]Piece V [c3]Piece XII [c4]Piece II [c1]1 cacōpi kōnnapō ••• itilō kavikhyāta tējasa[u]- [c2] -pōjvalaḥ [nava]timma nṛpō[ja]jñē••• [c3] -viṭṭha[l]ēśvarabhūpāla śrīviṭṭhalagu ṇāmśavān | cinta- [c4] -timmanṛpassarvētraya stē satguṇē- [c1]2 -vikhyāti prāptati mmēśō guṇaiḥ [pu]trapriyaḥ kṛtiḥ k[ō]narāma raṅga- [c2] -pi[nna]timmarājatiru malāmbayōḥ vira tiru[ma*]larāja sa- [c3] -dēvikā | catvārasta nayā stasyā vēmkaṭā drirmmahābala- [c4] -timmarājā gōpi nātharaṅganātha i- [c1]3 -taḥ viṭṭhalēśvara rāja syāparaubhaḷammāhvayāsatī | mahiṣī ta nujā sta- [c2] -dhuraḥ śrīmān tiru malāryā[bhi]dhaḥ cinna timma nṛpāla- [c3] -patipratā | kōna mmā nāmadhēyā yā stasyā putrāsta- [c4] -yābhavan kōnēri timmarājāhvayōram [c1]4 -yastirumala [priya]ḥ pāpatimmayarāja sala katimmētiprathāṅgataḥ tasya kumā- [c2] -raudvau namnākō navvōppalayādhiśvaraḥ paḷa- [c3] -yatē harivamśa pacōbalāt | ācandrārkagra hā dyau[su]- [c4] -vēdavinna samśayaḥ | apaurayānatumm- [c1]5 -bhaviṣyati kadā cana | jyēṣṭhastiru malanṛpaḥ candravam śapra- [c2] -•pakaḥ | cakraprabhā khyam rajatam nirmmi tam [c3] śrīraṅgēcārvaṇañca kṛētimmara || [ja] tiru mala- [c4] -[bhū]ḥ kṛṣṇaprityaikṛtiñcakṛēbā [c1]6 -••• vatābhidhām | tumbicipṛbhṛtī ñjitvā pāṇḍyā- [c2] -••• raja vī[ra]bhūmi pān | svarājya bhāravā- [c3] hantathā tvasat kṛtvātu dakṣiṇām b[hō]dhi- [c4] -stamarlapālayān vi••• pē-

Section III [c1]Piece XI [c2]Piece XIII [c3]Piece III [c4]Piece VIII [c5]Piece X [c1]1 -••• [naparā]ja•• [c2] su••••• kējajñē •••• - [c3] -nṛṣastataḥ dēvadhirōmaparastad āhavamalśa- [c4] -statastribhuvanamalśaḥ | tasmāca•••• - [c5] -kaḥ | ka[la]vāta[pu] ṣkara••••• [pyatha] [c1]2 -cābikkaścabukēpaśya nārā [ya*] ṇa- [c2] thā••• stataḥ na[r]ē ndrapālam cābi [c3] -kakānvayasampāḥ | cābikkanārāya•• - [c4] -damprāpnuvantihi | jagadēkamalśastasmājjā- [c5] -tābhuva[n]aikamalśaḥ udayaścōdabhū[t*]tasādviṣṇu- [c1]3 -[laja]nanāmakaḥ | jātōsmādvimalanyastatē- [c2] -smāccajajñērā[ya]vi••••••••• [c3] -sāraṅgadhara nāmakaḥ kaniṣṭhamātṛvacasa śujā- [c4] -[ga]ssidthatyāmga[ta]ḥ | cakṛrāja narēdvrōsō [c5] bhāratadva••• bhāgayā | cābikkabhimastajjāta- [c1]4 -upēndra udabhūttataḥ | cauhatta malśasta- [c2] -sāccajajñē rā[ja]vi••••••••• [c3] -dhasarvajñassōmē śvara nṛpastataḥ | kṛ ṣṇakandā- [c4] -rāyaścatatō dēśimkarāyakaḥ | kavyā śā- [c5] -[u]jjalumstasya caritam śraddayatē masat purāṇēna- [c1]5 -makēśrāvyamtatōhōmalśa rāyakaḥ | tajjā [c2] -tāvirahēmmābi ••• pravarttakaḥ••• yasa- [c3] -jā nātatasphōmanṛ pālakaḥ pinnahē mmāṭirē[ta] [c4] -•• �t [rāgha] vēndra nṛpastatōpinnama rājē- [c5] -[smā]t sōmadēva nrapasataḥ | jātō rāghavarājōsmā- [c1]6 -jātaḥ | pinnamarā• tataḥ | bukkarā jōmahānā[si]- [c2] -dikabālakasamasrabhaḥ rāmarājasta tōjātaḥ sa- [c3] -tivikṛmadharmmavān jātassukṛtarāśi rvaivi[khyā]- [c4] -[tō]janakōpamaḥ timmarājakalau matau dharmmarā- [c5] -jautiri•bahavastasyatanayā statra gōpāmbikā [c1]7 sthitāḥ | śrīmattimmanṛpēdvraviṭṭha lanṛp[ē]- [c2] -pau śri cinnatimmapra[sū]tatimmā khyama [c3] -kōnapēndranṛpati[m] śrīraṅgarā jam pra- [c4] -ti | śrīmadvaiṣṇavabhāvanāryasusvata śrī[raṅga]- [c5] -yākhya••••• rvā dhūlātvayisambhū ••• yajñaṣi-

Section IV [c1]Piece VI [c2]Piece IV [c3]Piece XV [c1]1 -t jēturmmahīpatin yātau yathātau rāmalakṣma[ṇa]u | bhītōbdhiddāpa- [c2] -mā••••••••• pōṭṭharaktāta[patrak]ētābhyāñca[k]rēraṅgapatē[ḥ] prityai- [c3] -śvara bhūpāla- [c1]2 -pōthā aḷaharēharē grāmān gatān samuddhṛtya grāmānnirmmāya tatraca viprē- [c2] -[bhy]ō vaiṣṇavēbhyaścānyēbhyaśca vibha jya ca kṣētrāṇi kārayāmās(ā)nitya [c3] -ṣitē ubhēram- [c1]3 -ramkē śōḷahari harau ēta smai [sānu] jāyādāa pura[mi] ṣṭān kṛpānidhiḥ ma- [c2] -dhuramaṇḍala stān[ē] śrīmadviṣṇu śivālayān grāmān stadiyānudthṛ- [c3] -t savān sam [bhū]- [c1]4 -gētana[ya]stirumalaprabhuḥ | [nitya]m viprāntada || nañcanityō tsavarathōtsavā- [c2] -n sarvadā kārayamās(ā) rātrau paryaṅgikōtsavān asyadharmma[sya] [c3] -grāmān pradāyā- [c1]5 -syu rākalpam putrapautrakaiḥ yēdharmmam pālayantī mām tēṣām samrakṣa- [c2] -[ṇ]ōhariḥ madvamśajāḥ paramahīpati vamśajāvā yē bhūmipā nṛpasamu [jva]la- [c3] -ham••••ranti narādhi-

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p: Digital edition of SII 23.510 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
